arts.ttl: Liverpool must act on Salah situation - Sutton
arts.sum: Monday Night Club's Chris Sutton and Rory Smith discuss Mohamed Salah's contract situation at Liverpool.

arts.ttl: Liverpool vs Real Madrid preview: Vinicius out of clash with hamstring injury
arts.sum: The Brazil forward played the whole match on Sunday as Real won 3-0 at Leganes in LaLiga but tests have revealed a leg issue and he has been left out of Carlo Ancelotti’s 19-man squad for the trip to Anfield. Vinicius Junior will miss Real Madrid ’s Champions League clash with Liverpool after sustaining a hamstring injury.

arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk dismisses Real Madrid theory ahead of Liverpool clash - 'I don't need fuel'
arts.sum: Liverpool will face Real Madrid in a blockbuster Champions League clash this week but Virgil van Dijk insists revenge is not driving them despite their poor record against the Spaniards

arts.ttl: ‘I was a Premier League wonderkid and rejected Man Utd, Liverpool and Chelsea’
arts.sum: Theo Walcott, who retired from football last summer following a career spanning almost two decades, was not short of interest when broke through with Southampton, but said joining Arsenal was an "easy option"

arts.ttl: Ex-Liverpool star identifies potential Mohamed Salah replacement after contract bombshell
arts.sum: Mohamed Salah could leave Liverpool on a free transfer at the end of the season and former Reds striker Emile Heskey has identified a potential replacement for the forward

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold reflects on the harsh realities of professional football
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold has opened up on the reality of football academies.

arts.ttl: Former Liverpool star's father urges him to leave his new club in astonishing Instagram post
arts.sum: Brentford had shared the result on Instagram at the final whistle with the caption 'A solid point on the road for the ten man Bees', but the post led to a frustrated response from the star's father.

arts.ttl: Man City suffer new injury blow before crunch Liverpool clash as nightmare run continues
arts.sum: Liverpool are already eight points clear of Manchester City at the top of the Premier League, with Pep Guardiola's men on a run of five successive defeats ahead of Sunday's clash at Anfield

arts.ttl: How Gravenberch became Liverpool's answer to Bellingham
arts.sum: Liverpool wanted to sign Jude Bellingham before he joined Real Madrid in 2023, but Ryan Gravenberch has proven to be a fine replacement option.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid transfer news: Carlo Ancelotti takes Arda Guler stance amid Premier League interest
arts.sum: Real Madrid boss Carlo Ancelotti publicly comments on the future of Arda Guler amid alleged interest from Premier League clubs.
